author: gb9t
content:
arch tier open questions resolved (user direction 2026-05-09): all 8 recommendations accepted.

arch/00-overview.md decisions (D1, D2):
- D1: arch-abstraction extraction deferred to v1+ first port (driven by arm64 likely first)
- D2: UML out of scope for v0

arch/x86/00-overview.md decisions (D1-D6):
- D1: 32-bit-only kernel (X86_32=y) out of scope; ia32 userspace compat IS in scope
- D2: FRED implemented alongside classic IDT path (both required because boot starts in IDT mode)
- D3: Full PV-OPS paravirt preserved (hypervisor-guest perf is part of drop-in promise)
- D4: math-emu out of scope (every x86_64 has hardware FPU)
- D5: vsyscall page in EMULATE mode by default (matches upstream CONFIG_LEGACY_VSYSCALL_EMULATE)
- D6: KVM in v0 with staged delivery; v0 graduation bar = kvm-unit-tests passes with same pass/fail set as upstream

Both arch docs now have 0 open questions. Ready for review.

Proceeding to next subsystem in dependency order: lib/00-overview.md (kernel utility library).
